activated_at.description: Timestamp at activation (nil for ready state).

duration_days.description: Duration for which a premium pass is active, configured in platform, 2-7 days

expires_at.description: Timestamp at expiration (nil for ready state).

info.description:
A suite of internet radio services and related metadata, membership,
preference, and advertising functions.

HTTPS is preferred for all requests. HTTP/2 is available on all
endpoints, and is also preferred if your client supports it.

Use a unique, meaningful `User-Agent` string when sending requests to
the API. Version your `User-Agent` header (eg, append a -v1 or similar)
to allow for varying functionality based on client in the future.
info.title: AudioAddict Platform API

api_key.description: Member-based auth which provides global access to act as a user on the API. Prefer using a session-based token like the Audio Token or Session Key instead.
api_key.name: X-Api-Key

audio_token.description: Session-based auth only valid for operations related to audio playback and performance reporting. Less-sensitive alternative to Session Keys which cannot be used for any member or billing related API calls.
audio_token.name: X-Audio-Token

session_key.description: Unique bearer token for identifying a specific member session, provides full API access in all auth contexts.
session_key.name: X-Session-Key
